package rulefixtures

// scenario for sync_pool_ignored_for_frequent_small_allocs: repeated `make([]byte, size)` or `new(T)` in hot paths where the object is short-lived and could be pooled
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule678NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario678Negative(records []Rule678NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
